original_title: IPX-440 The Fury Began After The Storm... Tsubasa Amami - Amami Tsubasa
overview: Tsubasa, Atsushi, and Yoshito have been childhood friends for ten years. Tsubasa and Atsushi have had a secret relationship since childhood. However, Atsushi decides to withdraw after knowing his best friend, Yoshito's feelings for Tsubasa. Soon the righteous man and Tsubasa get married. Married to another woman in order to cut off her feelings for philanthropy. However, such a married life should not last long and divorced. One day, a fierce typhoon hits Kanto. The chime of Atsushi's house rings. There was a figure of Tsubasa who was soaking wet and tears.
